privacy.metaDescription: How WanderMood handles your data and how to delete your account.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: WanderMood (“we”) respects your privacy. We collect only the information needed to run the app, personalize your day plans, and keep your account secure.
privacy.p2: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Data is sent over encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS) between the app and our services.
privacy.p3: You can request deletion of your account and associated personal data at any time. See the
privacy.p3After: page for step-by-step instructions, what we remove, and how to contact us if you cannot use the app.
privacy.p4: Categories of data we process include: account and profile information (e.g. email, display name, preferences you choose); approximate location when you allow it (for nearby places and weather); mood and planning choices you enter; content you create (e.g. saved places, plans, social posts); technical data such as device type and app diagnostics needed to operate the service.
privacy.p5: AI features (e.g. Moody chat and recommendations) send your prompts and relevant context to our backend (Supabase Edge Functions). Messages may be processed by model providers (e.g. OpenAI) under our instructions to generate replies. Do not send health data or passwords in chat.
privacy.p6: Processors and infrastructure: we use Supabase (EU or configured regions) for authentication, database, and storage; Vercel for this website; and map/weather/places providers where you use those features. Their processing is governed by our agreements and their privacy policies.
privacy.p7: This website uses only essential cookies and similar technologies needed to run the site (e.g. language preference). If we add analytics or marketing cookies later, we will update this policy and, where required, ask for your consent before non-essential cookies are set.
privacy.p8: European privacy rights (including GDPR): you may request access, correction, portability, or deletion of your personal data, and object to or restrict certain processing where applicable. Contact us at the email below; you may also lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

consent.banner: We use essential cookies to run this site (e.g. remember your language). We do not use advertising cookies on this page. See our Privacy policy for details.

terms.metaDescription: Terms governing use of the WanderMood mobile app and related services.
terms.title: Terms of service
terms.p1: By downloading or using WanderMood, you agree to these terms and to our Privacy policy. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.p2: WanderMood provides mood-based day planning, place discovery, and related social features. You are responsible for safeguarding your account and for content you post. You must not misuse the service, attempt to access others’ data without permission, or use the app in violation of applicable law.
terms.p3: The app and its content are provided “as available.” We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features, or update these terms, and will reflect material changes on this page where required.
terms.p4: Questions about these terms? Email us at

accountDeletion.metaDescription: How to delete your WanderMood account and associated data, in line with Google Play requirements.
accountDeletion.title: Delete your WanderMood account
accountDeletion.subtitle: This page explains how to permanently delete your account and personal data for the WanderMood mobile app (Android & iOS).
accountDeletion.sectionAppIntro: If you can open WanderMood on your phone or tablet:
accountDeletion.step1: Sign in with the account you want to remove.
accountDeletion.step2: Open the More tab (⋯) in the bottom navigation, then open Settings (or your profile / settings area).
accountDeletion.step3: Scroll to the danger zone and tap Delete account.
accountDeletion.step4: Type DELETE when asked, confirm in the dialog, and wait until the app confirms your account was deleted.
accountDeletion.sectionEmailBody: If you cannot use the app (for example you lost access to your device), email us from the address linked to your WanderMood account:
accountDeletion.sectionEmailAfter: Use the subject line “Account deletion” and include the email address you used to register. We may ask for reasonable information to verify that the request is yours before we delete the account.
accountDeletion.sectionDataIntro: When you complete in-app deletion, WanderMood removes your login and associated app data, including for example:
accountDeletion.dataItem2: Saved activities, mood entries, travel plans, and saved places
accountDeletion.dataItem3: Social data tied to you (such as likes, comments, friendships, and diary entries you created)
accountDeletion.dataItem4: Achievements, notification settings, sessions, and other account-related records stored in our backend
accountDeletion.sectionRetainBody: We may retain certain information for a limited time where required by law, for security or fraud prevention, or in encrypted backups until they expire. We do not use retained data to market to you after deletion.
